creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Yap was updated to 6.3.5 in January.  
I did attempt to update, but my cmake knowledge isn't up to the task.

A very manual build on FreeBSD 11.2S on i386 halted at
[ 15%] Building C object os/CMakeFiles/libYAPOs.dir/streams.c.o
/var/ports/usr/ports/lang/yap-plus/work/yap-6.3-master/os/streams.c:349:3: error: use of
      undeclared identifier 'TCHAR'
  TCHAR *path = Malloc(MAX_PATH + 1), *nameb = Malloc(MAX_PATH + 1);
  ^

Any chance that this or yap-devel be updated to 6.3.5?
